stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
On the tephigram, the green line represents the Dry Adiabatic Lapse Rate because:

options.a: The DALR is a linear decrease in air temperature with altitude at a constant rate.
options.b: The dry adiabatic lapse rate is not constant, its approximate lapse rate is 3°C/1000 ft, but it can vary.
options.c: The DALR is not linear as latent heat is released, and this is represented accordingly on the tephigram.
options.d: The dry adiabatic cooling is not represented by the green line.
